examples: "I'm frankly glad to hear that," Merrie said.
Merrie shook her head. "I don't think they've figured out yet how to live."
"Theft, exactly," Merrie said. "Poor innocent blameless Joey, stolen away by that little intellectual powerhouse next door."
Even the Paulsens lost interest in the Berglunds, now that Merrie was running for city council.
Not since the late 1970s have I come to an England that has so very little reason to be merrie.
